description_long: This is a stylized vinyl doll with an oversized head and small body, featuring pale blonde, wavy hair sculpted in large, defined sections. The face is minimalistic, with large black eyes, long painted eyelashes, and no visible mouth, giving it a neutral, expressionless look. The doll is dressed in a black suit with a white shirt underneath, and black shoes, evoking a formal or business-like appearance. The hands are small and positioned at the doll's sides, with no visible articulation. The surface is smooth and slightly glossy, typical of collectible vinyl figures. The overall design is reminiscent of popular pop culture figurines, intended for display or light play.
description: A stylized vinyl doll with oversized blonde hair, large black eyes, and a black formal outfit. The figure has a smooth, glossy finish and a minimalistic facial design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's large blonde hair, black eyes with long lashes, and black suit with white shirt.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the wavy sculpt of the hair and the profile of the face and body.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full volume and texture of the blonde hair, with the back of the suit visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, emphasizing the hair's sculptural flow and the side of the suit.
attribute_clothing_style: Black tailored suit with a white dress shirt, black pants, and black shoes, evoking a formal or business attire style.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms relaxed at the sides, legs straight and parallel, and head facing forward. The posture is static and symmetrical.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with large black eyes, long painted eyelashes, and no visible mouth or eyebrows.
attribute_hair_style: Medium-length, wavy blonde hair sculpted in large, voluminous sections, parted to the side.
